_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training job crashes, serving latency spikes, resource contention across shared clusters, and data pipeline breakdowns that affect model inputs.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.567), DA-A-002 (DA, cosine: 0.515).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.531). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [failed, recovering, servers, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, affect, breakdowns, clusters, contention, crashes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.912, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.056 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in recovering failed systems/servers." and "Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.572 ≈ STS 0.531 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [failed, recovering, servers, systems]. WIDAI-only: [across, affect, breakdowns, clusters, contention, crashes].
